MINI MINUTES: Yolita Nowak, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. Timothy Schowe, Esq. appearing for defendant Michael Byrne. Nicole Antonopoulos, Esq. appearing for Northwestern Mutual defendants. The court ordered plaintiff's counsel of record James Bryant to appear in person at the next OSC hearing, otherwise $800.00 sanction may be imposed against him. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to January 28, 2025 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

After hearing and further review, the court vacates the Jan-28-2025 OSC and schedules the case for a case management conference on May 28, 2025 at 10:30 am in Department 610.

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar May-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Melisa Rodriguez, Esq. 212-309-6000 of Morgan Lewis & Bockius LLP for Defendant Northwestern Mutual Life Ins. Comp pet al, The San Francisco Bay Area et al. through Court Call
Sara Poggi. Esq. 213-680-5170 of Lewis brisbois Bisgaard & Smith for Defendant Michael Byrne through Court Call.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT NORTHWESTERN MUTUAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY, NORTHWESTERN MUTUAL INVESTMENT SERVICES, LLC MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. The application of Melissa Rodriguez to appear pro hac vice as counsel to Defendants Northwestern Mutual Life Insurance Company and Northwestern Mutual Investment Services, LLC is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to California Rule of Court 9.40. The Court will sign the proposed order included with the motion.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
